overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through a futuristic neon-lit city. The player navigates wet streets reflecting bright advertisements, crosses intersections with moderate pedestrian and vehicle traffic, and passes towering skyscrapers with elevated highways and dense commercial signage.

events.description: approaching a group of pedestrians gathered at the intersection ahead

agents.ego_description: walking along a covered sidewalk next to a dark building wall, approaching pedestrians at an intersection

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians walking ahead on the sidewalk toward the intersection

reflective wet pavement surface with yellow tactile guidance strips

segments.scene_description: The segment begins on a covered sidewalk next to a dark building wall, walking toward an intersection. The wet pavement reflects the neon lights from a large digital billboard ahead. The space feels enclosed by the overhead bridge structure and tall buildings.

events.description: exits covered walkway into open intersection with crosswalks
crossing the street alongside other pedestrians while vehicles wait

agents.ego_description: crossing the intersection alongside other pedestrians, turning slightly to the right to follow the crosswalk

notable_agents.action: white sedan waiting at the intersection for pedestrians to cross

tall pole with traffic signals and digital information displays
tall modern skyscraper with illuminated window patterns

segments.scene_description: The scene opens up into a wide intersection as the camera exits the covered walkway. The player crosses the street with a crowd of pedestrians while a white sedan waits. A massive digital billboard dominates the right side, and a glass tower rises on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban street canyon with elevated highways

events.description: camera tilts upward to view towering buildings and elevated highway structures
waiting for moving traffic while continuing along the sidewalk

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk while looking up at the towering architecture and elevated highways overhead

entered.detail: multi-level highway structure with vehicles traveling overhead
tall yellow neon light poles lining the street
multiple stacked digital screens on building facade displaying various advertisements
modern glass curtain wall building with reflective surfaces

segments.scene_description: Walking along a street canyon with towering buildings on both sides, the camera looks up to reveal complex elevated highway overpasses. Vertical neon light strips illuminate the street, and multiple digital billboards cover the building facades ahead.

events.description: passing a bright green neon pharmaceutical sign illuminating the sidewalk

agents.ego_description: walking past commercial storefronts with bright neon signage, following the flow of pedestrians

notable_agents.action: person in colorful jacket walking ahead on the sidewalk

entered.detail: bright green neon sign with pharmaceutical cross symbol and text
lit entrance to commercial building with glass doors and displays

segments.scene_description: The walk continues through a dense commercial district with storefronts at street level. A prominent green neon pharmacy sign glows on the right, while overhead digital billboards display advertisements. The street remains wet, reflecting the colorful lights.

scene_state.functional_zone: major commercial intersection with heavy signage

events.description: entering large plaza intersection with multiple crosswalks and heavy vehicle traffic

agents.ego_description: approaching and entering a major intersection with heavy vehicle traffic and bright commercial signage

notable_agents.action: black car driving through the intersection

entered.detail: massive billboard with CIRCUS text and dramatic imagery
complex stacked highway ramps and bridges with multiple levels
dense collection of various neon signs and advertisements on building facade

segments.scene_description: The final segment opens into a major commercial plaza with a complex multi-level highway interchange visible ahead. A massive CIRCUS billboard dominates the right side, while dense clusters of neon signs illuminate the buildings. The player crosses the intersection amid moderate pedestrian and vehicle traffic.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a confined, shadowed walkway into the expansive, neon-drenched heart of a futuristic commercial district. It begins on a covered sidewalk beside a dark building, moving toward an intersection where wet pavement reflects the glow of a distant digital billboard. As the camera exits the overhead structure, the space opens into a wide intersection filled with pedestrians and waiting vehicles, flanked by a glass tower and a massive digital display. The scene then shifts into a deep street canyon, tilting upward to reveal complex elevated highway overpasses and vertical neon strips before gliding past street-level storefronts and a glowing green pharmacy sign. Finally, the path expands into a major commercial plaza dominated by a massive CIRCUS billboard and a multi-level highway interchange under a dense canopy of colorful lights.
